faction.necropolis.name: Necropolis
unit.t1-squelette.name: Skeleton
unit.t2-zombie.name: Rotting Zombie
unit.t3-spectre.name: Spectre
unit.t4-vampire.name: Vampire
unit.t5-liche.name: Lich
unit.t6-cavalier-funeste.name: Doom Knight
unit.t7-dragon-os.name: Bone Dragon
unit.t1-squelette-elite.name: Skeleton Warrior
unit.t2-zombie-elite.name: Plague Zombie
unit.t3-spectre-elite.name: Greater Spectre
unit.t4-vampire-elite.name: Vampire Lord
unit.t5-liche-elite.name: Power Lich
unit.t6-cavalier-funeste-elite.name: Death Knight
unit.t7-dragon-os-elite.name: Ghost Dragon
unit.t1-squelette.lore: We call him the simplified brother: stripped of fear, doubt and hunger, he keeps only obedience. The Wheel will reclaim the rest, in time.
unit.t1-squelette-elite.lore: We gave him back a blade and a discipline. He remembers nothing of the war that killed him; that, our priests say, is Asha's first mercy.
unit.t2-zombie.lore: The flesh still rots, yes. We do not hide it. Still it walks, patient, toward the foe: decay is only a stage, never an end.
unit.t2-zombie-elite.lore: Its pestilence walks ahead of its feet. The living call it plague; we call it an honest reminder that every body, one day, yields to Death.
unit.t3-spectre.lore: A soul that would not leave. We do not punish it: we carry it to war until it understands the Wheel turns for it too.
unit.t3-spectre-elite.lore: It glides silent where the living stumble. The cold it leaves is not cruelty, our books say, but the quiet absence of all that once weighed.
unit.t4-vampire.lore: He strikes and suffers no reply, then drinks the life of his prey. A sin, our novices whisper. A need, the master answers: faith too must be fed.
unit.t4-vampire-elite.lore: Lord of blood no longer his own. He now chooses who joins the Wheel, and when. Can a faith stay pure while it profits from every corpse?
unit.t5-liche.lore: She traded her flesh for time to learn. From afar she deals death in careful bolts: a scholar who made her own ending her subject of study.
unit.t5-liche-elite.lore: Her knowledge overflows the body that held it. Each bolt loosed is a lesson, dry and final, on the worth of the living who defy her.
unit.t6-cavalier-funeste.lore: A dead champion set back in the saddle and returned to the charge. He knows no banner nor oath now; he serves the Wheel at a gallop, never looking back.
unit.t6-cavalier-funeste-elite.lore: Where he rides, the living grasp their error: to have thought death far off. He hates no one. He comes only to correct the misunderstanding.
unit.t7-dragon-os.lore: A dragon of which only frame and fury remain. We raised it out of reverence: even the greatest must render their flesh back to the Wheel.
unit.t7-dragon-os-elite.lore: Neither bone nor flesh, only the memory of a dragon, howling in the wind. To see it is to glimpse what awaits us all: beautiful, cold, inevitable.
hero.vhalen.name: Vhalen
hero.vhalen.bio: A death knight whose blade knows neither fatigue nor mercy. He leads his vampires into battle like a pack, and every victory makes them more terrible.
hero.vhalen.specialty: Vampiric Knight — +1 attack and +1 defense to Vampires per 2 levels.
hero.mere-corbeau.name: Mother Crow
hero.mere-corbeau.bio: A necromancer of a thousand crows, she raises the bones of the battlefield into a patient army. Her skeletons strike harder as she rises.
hero.mere-corbeau.specialty: Necromancer — +1 attack to Skeletons per 2 levels.
hero.sandro.name: Sandro
hero.sandro.bio: A lich among liches, he has outlived his masters, his enemies and his own death. Every war thought finished still bears his signature.
hero.markal.name: Markal
hero.markal.bio: A court necromancer who whispered into a queen's ear until he ruled in her stead. His intrigues earn more than his battles.
hero.ornella.name: Ornella
hero.ornella.bio: A living noblewoman who joined the dead out of ambition and stayed out of loyalty. Her black armor has never failed — not even to the grave.
hero.specialty.maitre-liche.name: Lich Master
hero.specialty.intrigant-de-cour.name: Court Schemer
hero.specialty.dame-noire.name: Dark Lady
hero.olivier.name: Olivier Frostblight
hero.olivier.bio: Once an illuminator of reliquaries, he traded the gold of saints for the frost of graves. Olivier Frostblight seals his dead in necrotic ice, then lets them rot at will: where he treads, winter never thaws and flesh never rests.
hero.specialty.givrepeste.name: Frostblight
